description_long: This is a military-style, olive drab pickup truck reminiscent of World War II-era Willys Jeeps, featuring a boxy, utilitarian design. The vehicle has a flat hood with a white star insignia, a split windshield with blue-tinted glass, and rugged, deep-tread tires suitable for off-road use. The front grille is vertical with seven slots, flanked by round headlights, and the front bumper is simple and robust. The rear of the truck includes a mounted spare tire and a minimalistic cargo bed with metal rails. The interior is basic, with visible steering wheel and simple seating, and the exterior shows signs of weathering and rust, suggesting heavy use. The overall construction is primarily metal, with some rubber components for the tires and glass for the windows.
description: A weathered, olive drab military-style pickup truck with a white star insignia, split windshield, and rugged tires, featuring a rear cargo bed and mounted spare tire.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical grille, round headlights, split windshield, and white star insignia on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, metal rails over the cargo bed, and the spare tire mounted at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire, simple cargo bed, and the back of the split windshield and seats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open cabin, cargo bed, and rugged tires.
